## Description

Please provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this Pull Request, including the problem being solved and the proposed solution.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (README.md, ssot.md, code comments)
- [ ] Code style / Formatting (ktlint)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and formatting guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md`, `docs/ssot.md`, or comments) if my changes affect behaviour.
- [ ] My changes generate no new compiler warnings.
- [ ] I have run local unit tests and confirmed they pass.
- [ ] If applicable, I have run instrumented tests or verified on a physical device.

## Visual Changes (if applicable)

Please include screenshots or screen recordings showing the UI changes in both Light and Dark themes (including Dynamic Color/Material You if affected).
